nasb.text: “Therefore their way will be like slippery paths to them, They will be driven away into the gloom and fall down in it; For I will bring calamity upon them, The year of their punishment,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Therefore their way shall be to them like slippery paths in the darkness, into which they shall be driven and fall, for I will bring disaster upon them in the year of their punishment, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “因此，他們的路必像滑地； 他們必被趕逐到黑暗中， 必在那裡仆倒。 因為到了懲罰他們的年日， 我必使災禍臨到他們。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 因此，他们必被赶到黑暗中， 在湿滑的路上跌倒， 因为我必在报应的日子降灾祸给他们。 这是耶和华说的。
